data.body: hush-quail-holm DONE: decomposed reconcile_once (~760 LOC) IN-PLACE into a thin 12-line sequencer over _load_snapshots/_run_differs/_apply_mutations/_persist_and_log + lifted _handle_corrupt_snapshot, threading state via an in-file _PassContext dataclass (unpack ctx->locals, run verbatim, pack->ctx — bodies byte-preserved). reconcile.py stays allowlisted (1485 LOC, AC permits). Added test_reconcile_phases.py: 4 direct per-phase unit tests (corrupt-abort + manifest-tally + no-write + filter-metadata) — previously impossible. Full reconciler unit+integration suite 1069 + 4 new GREEN; mypy+make lint clean.
